For mental health, LifeFirst Standard Plan (rating 9) and HealthFirst Standard Plan (rating 8) are also relevant. (2) 'PrimeHome' matches 'PrimeHome Premium Coverage' under property_protection with rating 6. (3) 'PrimeTravel' matches 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan' under travel_insurance with rating 6. (4) 'PremiumSecure Luxury' most closely matches 'Premium Insurance Membership' under general_services, which has a rating of 6. Thus, the mapped ratings are: LifeFirst Standard Plan: 9, HealthFirst Standard Plan: 8, PrimeHome Premium Coverage: 6, PrimeTravel Premium Plan: 6, Premium Insurance Membership: 6.
